segment.source: Renders a person-focused header with a round avatar, name, role line, short rich-text bio, and up to two action buttons. Use it for: an individual's introduction at the top of an author, speaker, or staff profile page — name, job title, portrait, and one or two sentences of context from a CV or bio paragraph. Prefer 'Team Member Spotlight' for a person card inside a page; 'Team Section' for whole teams.
